features: Detangle Hair The smooth polished round-tipped metal pins allow you to remove hair tangles and knots with less snag and pulling, make your hair looking soft, smooth and shiny.

Massage Scalp Unlike ordinary scalp massage brush, the rounded end metal bristles can get deep into hair to massage scalp without scratching. It can help promote improved blood flow to the hair follicles, it can also help relieve stress and make you feel relaxed.

Less Static and Frizz The anti-static stainless bristle can prevent your hair from getting frizzy, so your hair will be smooth and shining. You will find it more easily to detangle hair at any length, texture or thickness.

Flexible and Durable Made of high quality stainless steel, not easy to break, durable for daily use, has no harm to hair and scalp. The rubber-cushioned base provides more flexibility and comfort. There is a reinforcement device at the bottom of each steel bristle so they won’t sink down into the rubber padding.

For All Hair Types. This metal hair brush is suitable for curly, normal, long, fine, thick, straight, frizzy hair. It can be used by women, men and kids, perfect for use at home, workplace, barber shop, hotel or other occasions. It's also a perfect gift for Valentine’s Day, an anniversary or birthday, or any other special occasion.
